label: Select Fields
description: Pick or omit specific fields by dot-path from an object or each row of an array. Replaces the JS-expression-only path through `transform` for the common 'project these columns' case.

settings.name: input
settings.label: Input (template or upstream)
settings.description: Path-template to the object/array. Omit to use the upstream connection's input directly.

settings.name: fields
settings.label: Fields (dot-paths)
settings.description: Array of dot-paths to keep (pick) or drop (omit). Each path is applied per-row when the input is an array.

settings.name: mode
settings.label: Mode
settings.description: pick = keep only the listed fields; omit = drop the listed fields, keep everything else.

ai.shortDescription: Pick or omit fields by dot-path from a row or array of rows.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to slim down an upstream array/object to a fixed set of columns before passing it to the next node (LLM context, email body, table render).
ai.examplePrompt: select name and status fields from each pod
ai.promptHints: Output shape mirrors input — array stays array, object stays object. Use dot-paths for nested fields ('metadata.name').
